title: CodeGrind adds Azure OpenAI assistant and Google sign-in for smoother on-boarding
summary: CodeGrind now integrates Azure OpenAI-based AI assistant and Google authentication, streamlining problem solving help and secure sign-ins for faster onboarding.
core_message: Enhance your CodeGrind experience with an AI-assisted problem-solving companion powered by Azure OpenAI and a streamlined Google-based sign-in flow for quicker, secure access.
cta: Explore the new AI assistant while signing in with Google today and accelerate your DSA practice.
visual_brief: A clean UI shot of CodeGrind editor with an AI chat panel on the right and a Google Sign-In button visible; include subtle cyberpunk accents and highlighting the Azure OpenAI logo in a corner. Optional before/after animation showing problem solving aided by AI tips appearing in real-time.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

bluesky_personal.text: CodeGrind adds an Azure OpenAI AI assistant and Google sign-in for faster onboarding. See the AI helper in action next to the Google Sign-In, with a cyberpunk touch. Explore the new AI assistant while signing in with Google today and accelerate your DSA practice. https://codegrind.online

linkedin.text: CodeGrind now integrates an Azure OpenAI-based AI assistant and Google authentication to streamline onboarding and problem-solving sessions. The updated UI highlights the AI chat panel alongside a visible Google Sign-In button, with a cyberpunk aesthetic. Explore the new AI assistant while signing in with Google today and accelerate your DSA practice. Learn more at https://codegrind.online
